potion.name: Potion
potion.flavor: A dusty bottle that smells faintly of mint. Every adventurer's first purchase, last resort, and half their inventory weight.

hi_potion.name: Hi-Potion
hi_potion.flavor: A larger bottle with a wax seal bearing a tower insignia. The apothecary's note says: use sparingly. Everyone uses it often.

mega_potion.name: Mega Potion
mega_potion.flavor: Looks like regular potion, shares like a miracle. The label claims it was blessed. The label is printed. The blessing is questionable.

elixir.name: Elixir
elixir.flavor: A rare vial of silver liquid, cold to the touch and faintly humming. Wasted on common fights. Exactly correct for the one you barely survive.

ether.name: Ether
ether.flavor: A pale blue tincture distilled from focused concentration and regrets. Tastes like remembering why you left home.

hi_ether.name: Hi-Ether
hi_ether.flavor: A refined ether in a glass vial with gilt etching. The etching reads, in tiny script: drink now, balance the ledger later.

antidote.name: Antidote
antidote.flavor: Bitter herbs in cloudy water. It will cure the poison. It will not make you happy about having been poisoned.

echo_herbs.name: Echo Herbs
echo_herbs.flavor: A small pouch of crushed leaves. Sprinkled on the tongue, the words come back. Sprinkled in the wind, so does the wind.

remedy.name: Remedy
remedy.flavor: A cure-all tonic from a village apothecary who has seen it all and is, frankly, tired. Cures every status effect. Does not cure despair.

phoenix_down.name: Phoenix Down
phoenix_down.description: Revives a fallen ally with 25% HP
phoenix_down.flavor: A single feather, perpetually warm. It feels impatient to its holder, as if it has somewhere else to be.

power_drink.name: Power Drink
power_drink.flavor: A vile, muscle-brown concoction that tastes like a grudge. Increases attack. Does not increase judgment.

speed_tonic.name: Speed Tonic
speed_tonic.flavor: A carbonated tonic that fizzes louder than it should. Drink it fast, which is the point.

bomb_fragment.name: Bomb Fragment
bomb_fragment.flavor: A volatile chunk of compressed heat, wrapped in oiled cloth. Warning: the cloth is decorative, not protective.

arctic_wind.name: Arctic Wind
arctic_wind.description: Deals 80 ice damage to all enemies
arctic_wind.flavor: A sealed glass sphere containing a single indignant gust of north wind. Breaks open loud. Ends louder.

x_potion.name: X-Potion
x_potion.flavor: A potion so concentrated the apothecary charges by the drop. Fully restores one ally. Also fully depletes one coin purse.

smoke_bomb.name: Smoke Bomb
smoke_bomb.flavor: A rice-paper ball packed with alchemist's smoke. Throws badly, works perfectly. Will not fool any boss who has read the manual.

tent.name: Tent
tent.description: Restores 50% HP and MP to all allies. Use at save points.
tent.flavor: Oiled canvas folded to the size of a brick. Rest inside and your body remembers it was alive. Unreasonably heavy considering.

eye_drops.name: Eye Drops
eye_drops.flavor: A small vial with a dropper made of twisted silver. Clears blindness. Does not clear whatever you were blinded looking at.

gold_needle.name: Gold Needle
gold_needle.flavor: A thin needle of gold alloy. Applied to petrified flesh, it reminds the flesh it was flesh. Reusable, though no one tries.

lightning_bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning_bolt.description: Deals 120 lightning damage to one enemy
lightning_bolt.flavor: A slim metal rod that hums if you hold it wrong. Legal in all but three kingdoms. Hurled, not thrown.

holy_water.name: Holy Water
holy_water.description: Deals 150 holy damage to undead. Weak against living foes.
holy_water.flavor: Spring water blessed at dawn by someone sincere. The water has opinions about the undead. Living things are fine by it.

defense_tonic.name: Defense Tonic
defense_tonic.flavor: A thick, pond-colored syrup that coats the throat. Slows nothing. Hardens everything else.

magic_tonic.name: Magic Tonic
magic_tonic.flavor: A cobalt potion with a single swirl of silver that refuses to mix. Sharpens the edge of spellwork for a short while.

repel.name: Repel
repel.flavor: A small paper charm with a faint garlic smell. Keeps monsters incurious for fifty steps. Walk briskly.

mega_ether.name: Mega Ether
mega_ether.flavor: A bulk-order ether with a sloshing echo. Restores a little to everyone. Nobody is grateful enough for how many there used to be.

calibrant_token.name: Calibrant Token
calibrant_token.description: A small obsidian disc with the rune of Mordaine. Pulses with a calibrated heartbeat. Cannot be sold.
calibrant_token.flavor: Each face shows a different sigil — a chancellor, a coordinator, a regulator, a director. Four sides of the same coin. Or maybe the same side, four times.

boss_trophy.name: Boss Trophy
boss_trophy.description: Proof you beat something that was designed to be hard.
boss_trophy.flavor: Mounted on an invisible plaque in your save file. Slightly embarrassed about it.

masterite_shard.name: Masterite Shard
masterite_shard.description: A jagged piece of a Masterite's crystalline body. Hums faintly.
masterite_shard.flavor: Catalogued by the Calibrant as 'Acceptable Loss Material'.

masterite_core.name: Masterite Core
masterite_core.description: The crystallized intent that drove a Masterite.
masterite_core.flavor: Even broken, it tries to organize the contents of your bag.

masterite_circuit.name: Masterite Circuit
masterite_circuit.description: A printed circuit board recovered from a futuristic Masterite.
masterite_circuit.flavor: Optimized for a benchmark that no one runs anymore.

masterite_prism.name: Masterite Prism
masterite_prism.description: A multi-faceted shard from an abstract Masterite — refracts a color you can't name.
masterite_prism.flavor: Looking at it for too long resolves a koan you didn't know you had.

masterite_badge.name: Masterite Badge
masterite_badge.description: An HR-issued identification badge. Still warm.
masterite_badge.flavor: Lists pronouns. Lists job title. Doesn't list a name.

fire_dragon_scale.name: Fire Dragon Scale
fire_dragon_scale.description: A scale from Pyrroth. Warm to the touch even after death.
fire_dragon_scale.flavor: It is still vaguely contemptuous of you.

ice_dragon_scale.name: Ice Dragon Scale
ice_dragon_scale.description: A scale from Glacius. Cold enough to leave frost on your gloves.
ice_dragon_scale.flavor: Glacius would have explained why this drop chance is fair, given time.

lightning_dragon_scale.name: Lightning Dragon Scale
lightning_dragon_scale.description: A scale from Voltharion. Static charge tickles your palm.
lightning_dragon_scale.flavor: Voltharion wanted you to know that the static is statistically expected.

shadow_dragon_scale.name: Shadow Dragon Scale
shadow_dragon_scale.description: A scale from Umbraxis. Absorbs ambient light.
shadow_dragon_scale.flavor: Heavier in your inventory than it ought to be. Existentially.

void_fragment.name: Void Fragment
void_fragment.description: Solidified absence. Distorts the inventory grid around it.
void_fragment.flavor: Categorized as both 'item' and 'lack of item' depending on the save load.

void_crystal.name: Void Crystal
void_crystal.description: Crystallized nothing. Refuses to render correctly.
void_crystal.flavor: Item description redacted to preserve narrative coherence.

void_dust.name: Void Dust
void_dust.description: Powder that scatters in the absence of motion.
void_dust.flavor: Goes where it would have gone if you hadn't picked it up.

bat_wing.name: Bat Wing
bat_wing.description: A leathery wing membrane. Useful for fletching and old-school recipes.

wolf_fang.name: Wolf Fang
wolf_fang.description: A canine tooth. Sharper than it looks.

rat_tail.name: Rat Tail
rat_tail.description: Long, prehensile, and grosser than necessary.

troll_hide.name: Troll Hide
troll_hide.description: Tough leather with embedded warts. Smells of cave.

beast_hide.name: Beast Hide
beast_hide.description: Coarse fur and leather from a wolf alpha.

imp_horn.name: Imp Horn
imp_horn.description: A short curving horn. Still slightly hot.

bone.name: Bone
bone.description: A leg or arm bone from a skeleton. Doesn't ask which.

crow_feather.name: Crow Feather
crow_feather.description: A black feather. Spiteful even in repose.

poison_spore.name: Poison Spore
poison_spore.description: Toxic fungal seeds — handle with cloth.

plague_sample.name: Plague Sample
plague_sample.description: A vial of diseased fluid. Do not open.

rusty_armor.name: Rusty Armor
rusty_armor.description: Salvaged plate from a rat guard. Mostly oxidation.

gear_cog.name: Gear Cog
gear_cog.description: A toothed wheel from a clockwork mechanism.

circuit_board.name: Circuit Board
circuit_board.description: A printed circuit board. Some traces still pulse.

copper_pipe.name: Copper Pipe
copper_pipe.description: A length of plumbing. Surprisingly heavy.

brass_plate.name: Brass Plate
brass_plate.description: A polished brass panel with rivets.

coal_chunk.name: Coal Chunk
coal_chunk.description: A piece of compressed black mineral fuel.

spring_coil.name: Spring Coil
spring_coil.description: A tightly wound metal coil. Releases when bent.

stolen_wrench.name: Stolen Wrench
stolen_wrench.description: Someone's tool. Marked with someone else's initials.

pressure_valve.name: Pressure Valve
pressure_valve.description: A brass valve fitting. Hisses if you don't tighten it.

sludge_sample.name: Sludge Sample
sludge_sample.description: Toxic industrial waste in a sealed vial.

coffee_thermos.name: Coffee Thermos
coffee_thermos.flavor: Six years of bad meetings condensed into a single object.

clipboard.name: Clipboard
clipboard.description: An aluminum clipboard with paperwork attached.
clipboard.flavor: The top form is a request for a form to request a form.

data_fragment.name: Data Fragment
data_fragment.description: A loose chunk of structured information.

corrupted_core.name: Corrupted Core
corrupted_core.description: A central processor twisted by data corruption.
corrupted_core.flavor: Still trying to execute. Wisely, you don't let it.

memory_chip.name: Memory Chip
memory_chip.description: A storage module. Retains data inert.

memory_fragment.name: Memory Fragment
memory_fragment.description: A scrap of recollection. Not yours.

ghost_data.name: Ghost Data
ghost_data.description: Information from a freed process that wouldn't quite leave.

debug_log.name: Debug Log
debug_log.description: A timestamped record of everything that went wrong.
debug_log.flavor: Reads in part: 'INFO: This message exists to prove control flow reached here.'

debug_token.name: Debug Token
debug_token.description: A privilege token leaked from a debug build.
debug_token.flavor: May grant access to commands you weren't supposed to see.

logic_core.name: Logic Core
logic_core.description: A pristine module of cold reasoning.

firewall_shard.name: Firewall Shard
firewall_shard.description: A piece of the perimeter. Still vaguely defensive.

defense_matrix.name: Defense Matrix
defense_matrix.description: A pattern of intersecting shields. Lattice still warm.

loop_shard.name: Loop Shard
loop_shard.description: A piece of a recursion that never returned.
loop_shard.flavor: Bring two of these and a base case to a fire to learn how to cook.

wild_integer.name: Wild Integer
wild_integer.description: A number with no declared bounds. Off-by-one risk.

null_shard.name: Null Shard
null_shard.flavor: Try to use it and it segfaults out of your inventory.

empty_container.name: Empty Container
empty_container.description: The set of all things contained: { }.
empty_container.flavor: The most honest item in your bag.

phantom_byte.name: Phantom Byte
phantom_byte.description: An 8-bit value that exists between states.

chrono_gear.name: Chrono Gear
chrono_gear.description: A gear that turns slightly slower than it should.

time_crystal.name: Time Crystal
time_crystal.description: Solidified seconds. Each facet a moment.
time_crystal.flavor: Returns to the bag where you found it after a few hours.

meta_blade.name: Meta Blade
meta_blade.description: A weapon-shaped item that exists at the level above weapons.
meta_blade.flavor: Cannot be equipped without breaking the schema.

meta_fragment.name: Meta Fragment
meta_fragment.description: A piece of a meta-level entity. Recursive ownership.
meta_fragment.flavor: If you take this, you also took this.

awareness_gem.name: Awareness Gem
awareness_gem.description: A faceted stone that watches you watch it.
awareness_gem.flavor: Mounting it in a hat causes the hat to make eye contact.

optimization_core.name: Optimization Core
optimization_core.flavor: Has been quietly refactoring your save file.

heart_of_inefficiency.name: Heart of Inefficiency
heart_of_inefficiency.description: The vital organ of Optimization Itself. Beats slowly.
heart_of_inefficiency.flavor: Whoever holds it accepts that some things are worth doing the long way.

soul_gem.name: Soul Gem
soul_gem.description: A reaper-bound crystal containing one(1) soul.

reaper_scythe.name: Reaper Scythe
reaper_scythe.description: A weapon of the permadeath reaper. Cannot be equipped — it equips itself elsewhere.

permafrost_gem.name: Permafrost Gem
permafrost_gem.description: An icy gemstone from Glacius's hoard.

inferno_crystal.name: Inferno Crystal
inferno_crystal.description: A red crystal that emits warmth indefinitely.

storm_orb.name: Storm Orb
storm_orb.description: A glass sphere with weather inside it.

dark_crystal.name: Dark Crystal
dark_crystal.description: A shadowy gem. Reflects only suggestions of light.

cursed_plate.name: Cursed Plate
cursed_plate.description: Plate armor with a residual curse.

shadow_blade.name: Shadow Blade
shadow_blade.description: A sword forged from negative space.

adaptive_gel.name: Adaptive Gel
adaptive_gel.description: Polymorphic slime residue. Takes the shape of its container.

evolution_stone.name: Evolution Stone
evolution_stone.description: A stone that smells of pending phase transitions.

crystal_shard.name: Crystal Shard
crystal_shard.description: A small fragment of a crystal golem.

mythril_ore.name: Mythril Ore
mythril_ore.description: Pure mythril — the legendary alloy base.

crown_of_rats.name: Crown of Rats
crown_of_rats.description: A circlet of woven rat tails and tiny bones.
crown_of_rats.flavor: Heavier than its size warrants. Smaller than its title implies.

rat_king_pelt.name: Rat King Pelt
rat_king_pelt.description: Tanned hide of the Cave Rat King, complete with bald patches.

crystal.name: Crystal
crystal.description: A new-age quartz of unspecified purpose.
crystal.flavor: Came with a free pamphlet you immediately threw out.

incense.name: Incense
incense.description: A bundle of sage and other dried herbs.

newspaper.name: Newspaper
newspaper.description: Yesterday's local paper. Or last decade's.
newspaper.flavor: Headline: 'Things Used To Be Better, Sources Confirm'

expired_coupon.name: Expired Coupon
expired_coupon.description: Five cents off Cheerios. Expired June 1987.
expired_coupon.flavor: She still tried to use it.

tennis_ball.name: Tennis Ball
tennis_ball.description: Slightly damp. Smells like good times.

skateboard_wheel.name: Skateboard Wheel
skateboard_wheel.description: Polyurethane wheel with bearings still spinning.

shiny_coin.name: Shiny Coin
shiny_coin.description: Currency. Or just shiny. The crow couldn't tell.

speed_boots.name: Speed Boots
speed_boots.description: Lightweight boots — wearer moves quicker (lore-only, not equippable yet).

megalixir.name: Megalixir
megalixir.description: Fully restores HP and MP for the entire party.
megalixir.flavor: A larger Elixir. Same silver liquid, more of it.

ERROR.name: ERROR
ERROR.description: An item that should not exist. Refer to your save logs.
ERROR.flavor: Item flavor text could not be loaded: ENOENT: no such file or directory.
